name: @ge/connector-core
description: Minimal live-system connector: dial a REST binding read-only. Structurally refuses write-class methods (the method allowlist is not a flag a caller can forget), resolves auth by env reference at call time (the token value never persists, never lands in an error or artifact), and exposes probe/call plus a probeRestBinding helper for `ge systems doctor --dial`. Deliberately small — the full connector SDK grows from this interface only as consumers appear (docs/plans/real-system-twins/parallel-and-deferred.md). Dependency-free; fetch is injectable for tests.
